key_components: save_history() - Persists GenerationRecord list to timestamped JSON
load_history() - Deserializes JSON back to GenerationRecord objects
list_history_files() - Lists history files sorted by modification time

changes: subtask-4-2 status: pending → completed with notes and timestamp
subtask-4-3 status: pending → completed with notes and timestamp
subtask-4-4 status: pending → completed with notes and timestamp

patterns_discovered.description: Uses model_dump(mode='json') for serialization and model_validate() for deserialization
Uses 'raise ... from exc' for exception chaining with context
patterns_discovered.benefit: Preserves original error context for debugging

patterns_discovered.description: _ensure_output_dir() called only when needed in save_history
Uses timezone.utc and 'Z' suffix for timestamps
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents timezone ambiguity in history file names

patterns_discovered.description: Uses union syntax (str | Path) instead of Union[str, Path]
All public functions have Args, Returns, and Raises sections
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear API documentation and IDE support

gotchas_discovered.description: Function raises FileNotFoundError if file doesn't exist - callers must handle this
gotchas_discovered.risk: Unhandled exceptions if file is deleted between checks
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document required try-except blocks in caller code

gotchas_discovered.description: Catches broad Exception type which could mask unexpected errors
gotchas_discovered.risk: Difficult to distinguish validation errors from system errors
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider catching more specific Pydantic ValidationError

gotchas_discovered.description: list_history_files() sorts by mtime - files created in same second may have unstable order
gotchas_discovered.risk: Unpredictable ordering for rapidly generated history files
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider secondary sort by filename (timestamp string) for stability

gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple processes writing simultaneously could corrupt JSON files
gotchas_discovered.risk: Data loss or corruption under high concurrency
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider file locking or atomic writes if concurrent access expected

requirements_met: JSON file persistence in output/ directory
approach_outcome.implementation_notes: Created history.py with save_history, load_history, and list_history_files functions. Uses timestamped JSON files in output/ directory.

recommendations.suggestion: Replace generic Exception with specific Pydantic ValidationError in load_history
recommendations.rationale: Better error diagnostics and handling specificity

recommendations.suggestion: Add unit tests for corrupted JSON, missing files, and invalid record formats
Add file retention policy function to clean up old history files

recommendations.rationale: Support analysis workflows across multiple generations

recommendations.suggestion: Document JSON schema/format for history files
recommendations.rationale: Enable tool-based validation and cross-language compatibility

recommendations.suggestion: Consider gzip compression for large history files
recommendations.rationale: Reduce disk space for archives with many generations
